channel.title: AIdeazz — Building in Public On The Go
channel.description: Building in public, on the go — AI-augmented, agentic, from A to Z. Honest lessons on building a company with AI agents, marketing engines, and shipping in production. By Elena Revicheva.
channel.itunes:author: Elena Revicheva
channel.itunes:summary: Building in public, on the go — AI-augmented, agentic, from A to Z. Honest lessons on building a company with AI agents, marketing engines, and shipping in production. By Elena Revicheva.

image.title: AIdeazz — Building in Public On The Go

item.title: Pitching AI to Non-Technical Investors
item.description:
In this brief episode snippet, we hear fragments of a conversation touching on AI-augmented technology management from a legal background perspective. The speaker discusses connecting with potential investors in the AI space, noting that not many people are familiar with what they're working on.
While this recording captures only the opening moments of a conversation, it hints at themes around vertical integration, top-level management approaches, and the challenges of communicating AI innovations to investors who may lack technical context.
Chapters: 0:04 Introduction and Vertical Integration Discussion 0:12 AI-Augmented Tech Management with Legal Background 0:18 Investor Connection Challenges in AI
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/why-your-ai-pitch-fails-with-non-technical-investors-and-how-to-fix-it
item.itunes:summary:
In this brief episode snippet, we hear fragments of a conversation touching on AI-augmented technology management from a legal background perspective. The speaker discusses connecting with potential investors in the AI space, noting that not many people are familiar with what they're working on.
While this recording captures only the opening moments of a conversation, it hints at themes around vertical integration, top-level management approaches, and the challenges of communicating AI innovations to investors who may lack technical context.
Chapters: 0:04 Introduction and Vertical Integration Discussion 0:12 AI-Augmented Tech Management with Legal Background 0:18 Investor Connection Challenges in AI
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/why-your-ai-pitch-fails-with-non-technical-investors-and-how-to-fix-it

item.title: Building software while constantly moving
item.description:
Elena reflects on the unique mental state of building a business while constantly in motion. She explores what it means to work not just while physically traveling, but in the liminal spaces between commitments—waiting for flights, between meetings, in transit.
This brief opening meditation sets the stage for a conversation about the realities of running a solo AI venture while maintaining a nomadic lifestyle, and how perpetual movement shapes both productivity and creative thinking.
Chapters: 0:00 Building While Moving: Physical and Mental States
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/why-i-stopped-waiting-for-deep-work-blocks-and-started-building-in-tax
item.itunes:summary:
Elena reflects on the unique mental state of building a business while constantly in motion. She explores what it means to work not just while physically traveling, but in the liminal spaces between commitments—waiting for flights, between meetings, in transit.
This brief opening meditation sets the stage for a conversation about the realities of running a solo AI venture while maintaining a nomadic lifestyle, and how perpetual movement shapes both productivity and creative thinking.
Chapters: 0:00 Building While Moving: Physical and Mental States
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/why-i-stopped-waiting-for-deep-work-blocks-and-started-building-in-tax

item.title: Daily routine of an AI-augmented solo builder
item.description:
Elena Revicheva shares an unfiltered look at her daily routine as an AI-augmented solo founder. This episode breaks down the practical, unglamorous reality of building with AI assistance.
From waking hours to sleep schedules, Elena challenges the hustle culture narrative and emphasizes self-awareness over productivity theater. She's learned what works for her body and mind, including the important realization that 4 a.m. wake-up calls aren't necessary for success.
Chapters: 0:00 Daily Routine Introduction 0:00 Wake Up Time and Sleep Philosophy
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/my-daily-routine-as-an-ai-augmented-solo-builder-no-productivity-porn
item.itunes:summary:

From waking hours to sleep schedules, Elena challenges the hustle culture narrative and emphasizes self-awareness over productivity theater. She's learned what works for her body and mind, including the important realization that 4 a.m. wake-up calls aren't necessary for success.
Chapters: 0:00 Daily Routine Introduction 0:00 Wake Up Time and Sleep Philosophy
Full write-up: https://aideazz.xyz/blog/my-daily-routine-as-an-ai-augmented-solo-builder-no-productivity-porn
